g.text: A multi-agent murder-mystery game built on autogen.beta
One-liner: "Lying AIs are free to bluff — except where their data says otherwise. Ask a sharp enough question, and the truth is forced."
autogen.beta.Actor × 8 · Gemini 3 Flash · AGUIStream · Starlette · SSE · vanilla JS
Tested end-to-end via Chrome DevTools MCP
tool_call events rendered live · 📎 Evidence Forced banner
prompt: public alibi + private truth + compliance rule
🌫 Vague → speaks freely (may lie about motive)
⚡ Invoked → MUST call query_dossier, truthful rows
Populated ONLY from real tool events — the LLM never writes facts from recall.
is ONE line. No router, no graph.
VerifiedFacts come from REAL tool calls.
